Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0400 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Return of the Jedi (J1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$37 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Return of the Jedi (J1).prg"
